description_long: This object depicts a construction worker dressed in practical safety attire. The figure wears an orange hard hat, black short-sleeve shirt, orange work shorts with black suspenders, and protective yellow gloves. The worker is also equipped with black knee pads and sturdy brown work boots, suitable for rugged environments. The gloves and helmet are designed for safety, while the boots and knee pads provide additional protection. The overall appearance is that of a professional laborer prepared for construction or roadwork in an urban setting.
description: A construction worker figure wearing an orange hard hat, black shirt, orange shorts, yellow gloves, and brown work boots, outfitted for safety and utility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange hard hat, black shirt, yellow gloves, orange shorts, and brown boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, gloves, and the layered clothing, with boots and knee pads visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black suspenders, back of the helmet, gloves, and boots, with the shorts and knee pads from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the helmet brim, gloves, and the side profile of the boots and shorts.
